pr.title: Fix cron jobs not pushing packages
pr.author: ribbanya

summary: Fixed the package publishing workflow so scheduled cron runs can push packages. The workflow previously gated push steps on `github.event_name == 'push'`, which excluded scheduled builds; the PR changed those conditions to `github.event_name != 'pull_request'`, allowing both push and schedule-triggered jobs to publish while still preventing PR builds from pushing packages.
what_changed: In `.github/workflows/publish-packages.yml`, changed a Docker `build-push-action@v4` package push step condition from `github.event_name == 'push'` to `github.event_name != 'pull_request'`.
Made the same conditional change for a later bash-based `Push package` step in the same workflow.
The change broadens publishing eligibility from only push events to all non-PR events, which includes scheduled cron runs.
smart_moves: Used a negative PR guard rather than adding a schedule-specific condition, keeping the workflow concise and preserving the safety rule that pull requests should not push packages.
Applied the same event predicate to both package push sites, avoiding a partial fix where one package path would still skip scheduled publishing.
The fix targeted the workflow condition directly with a minimal two-line change, reducing risk to unrelated CI behavior.
decomp_lessons: Infrastructure fixes can affect decomp productivity: scheduled package jobs need to publish artifacts/images reliably so contributors get current tooling and dependencies.
When GitHub Actions jobs must run for scheduled builds and regular pushes but not PRs, prefer gating on `github.event_name != 'pull_request'` over `github.event_name == 'push'`.
Audit all equivalent publish/deploy steps in a workflow when fixing event gating; duplicated push logic can require duplicated condition fixes.
review_feedback: No review comments were present in the provided PR slice. The only review activity was summarized as one review, with no excerpted feedback.
searchable_terms: Fix cron jobs not pushing packages
follow_up_queries: Find other PRs touching `.github/workflows/publish-packages.yml` for package publishing workflow history.
Search for other uses of `github.event_name == 'push'` that might unintentionally exclude scheduled workflow runs.
Review current publish workflow to confirm all deployment/push steps remain guarded against `pull_request` events.
